items.label: Letta runtime
items.detail: SDK session not connected in this preview
items.action: Connect Letta in Settings → General

items.label: Agent identity
items.action: Set the agent in Settings → Connect Letta

items.label: Model provider
items.detail: Provider auth lives in Letta, not Otto
items.action: Configure providers in Letta Desktop / Letta local runtime

items.label: Memory / MemFS
items.detail: Depends on a live runtime connection
items.action: Available once the runtime connects

items.label: Workspace root
items.action: Override with OTTO_HOME

items.label: Skills
items.action: Install into a live agent via scripts/install.sh

items.label: Practices
items.detail: Practice store + bundled catalog wired in desktop IPC
items.action: Open Practices surface in the desktop app

items.label: MCP servers
items.action: Add mcpServers in ~/.otto/config.json

items.label: Functions
items.action: Register functions in ~/.otto/config.json

items.label: Labs master

items.action: Toggle in Settings → Labs or window.otto.labs.set

items.action: Open Autonomy surface; runtime permission modal ships separately
